channel.title: TianoCore.org — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by TianoCore.org (tianocore).

item.title: CVE-2025-2296 · 8.4 HIGH — Un-verified kernel bypass Secure Boot mechanism in direct boot mode
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “ Improper Input Validation” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could alter control flow in unexpected ways, potentially allowing arbitrary command executio…

item.title: CVE-2024-38798 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Uncleared password keystrokes in circular queue can lead to information disclosure or escalation of privilege
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will lead to possible information disclosure or escalation o…

item.title: CVE-2024-38805 · 6.3 MEDIUM — iSCSI Remote Memory Corruption and Denial of Service
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause an Integer Overflow or Wraparound by network means. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2025-3770 · 7 HIGH — SMM IDT Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where an attacker may cause “Protection Mechanism Failure” by local access. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will lead to arbitrary code execution and impact Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availabil…

item.title: CVE-2024-38797 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Out-of-bounds Read in HashPeImageByType()
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in the HashPeImageByType(). A user may cause a read out of bounds when a corrupted data pointer and length are sent via an adjecent network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Integrity and/…

item.title: CVE-2025-2295 · 3.5 LOW — Potential iSCSI R2T PDU Vulnerability
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in BIOS where a user may cause an Integer Overflow or Wraparound by network means. A successful exploitation of this vulnerability may lead to denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2024-38796 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Integer overflow in PeCoffLoaderRelocateImage
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability in the PeCoffLoaderRelocateImage(). An Attacker may cause memory corruption due to an overflow via an adjacent network. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Confidentiality, Integrity, and/or…

item.title: CVE-2024-1298 · 6 MEDIUM — Integer Overflow caused by divide by zero during S3 suspension
item.description: EDK2 contains a vulnerability when S3 sleep is activated where an Attacker may cause a Division-By-Zero due to a UNIT32 overflow via local access. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to a loss of Availability.

item.title: CVE-2023-45234 · 8.3 HIGH — Buffer Overflow in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a buffer overflow vulnerability when processing DNS Servers option from a DHCPv6 Advertise message. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a loss…

item.title: CVE-2023-45233 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Infinite loop in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to an infinite lop vulnerability when parsing a PadN option in the Destination Options header of IPv6. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a loss…

item.title: CVE-2023-45232 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Infinite loop in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to an infinite loop vulnerability when parsing unknown options in the Destination Options header of IPv6. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a l…

item.title: CVE-2023-45235 · 8.3 HIGH — Buffer Overflow in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a buffer overflow vulnerability when handling Server ID option from a DHCPv6 proxy Advertise message. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a lo…

item.title: CVE-2023-45237 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use of a Weak PseudoRandom Number Generator in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a predictable TCP Initial Sequence Number. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a loss of Confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2023-45236 · 5.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Predictable TCP ISNs in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a predictable TCP Initial Sequence Number. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a loss of Confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2023-45231 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Out-of-Bounds Read in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to an out-of-bounds read vulnerability when processing Neighbor Discovery Redirect message. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a loss of Confide…

item.title: CVE-2023-45230 · 8.3 HIGH — Buffer Overflow in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to a buffer overflow vulnerability via a long server ID option in DHCPv6 client. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead to a loss of Confidentiality, I…

item.title: CVE-2023-45229 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Out-of-Bounds Read in EDK II Network Package
item.description: EDK2's Network Package is susceptible to an out-of-bounds read vulnerability when processing the IA_NA or IA_TA option in a DHCPv6 Advertise message. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker to gain unauthorized access and potentially lead…

item.title: CVE-2022-36765 · 7 HIGH — Integer Overflow in CreateHob
item.description: EDK2 is susceptible to a vulnerability in the CreateHob() function, allowing a user to trigger a integer overflow to buffer overflow via a local network. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may result in a compromise of confidentiality, int…

item.title: CVE-2022-36764 · 7 HIGH — Heap Buffer Overflow in Tcg2MeasurePeImage
item.description: EDK2 is susceptible to a vulnerability in the Tcg2MeasurePeImage() function, allowing a user to trigger a heap buffer overflow via a local network. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may result in a compromise of confidentiality, integrity…

item.title: CVE-2022-36763 · 7 HIGH — Heap Buffer Overflow in Tcg2MeasureGptTable
item.description: EDK2 is susceptible to a vulnerability in the Tcg2MeasureGptTable() function, allowing a user to trigger a heap buffer overflow via a local network. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may result in a compromise of confidentiality, integrit…

item.title: CVE-2021-38578 · 7.4 HIGH
item.description: Existing CommBuffer checks in SmmEntryPoint will not catch underflow when computing BufferSize.

item.title: CVE-2021-38576
item.description: A BIOS bug in firmware for a particular PC model leaves the Platform authorization value empty. This can be used to permanently brick the TPM in multiple ways, as well as to non-permanently DoS the system.

item.title: CVE-2021-38575
item.description: NetworkPkg/IScsiDxe has remotely exploitable buffer overflows.

item.title: CVE-2021-28216
item.description: BootPerformanceTable pointer is read from an NVRAM variable in PEI. Recommend setting PcdFirmwarePerformanceDataTableS3Support to FALSE.

item.title: CVE-2021-28213
item.description: Example EDK2 encrypted private key in the IpSecDxe.efi present potential security risks.

item.title: CVE-2021-28211
item.description: A heap overflow in LzmaUefiDecompressGetInfo function in EDK II.

item.title: CVE-2021-28210
item.description: An unlimited recursion in DxeCore in EDK II.
